name: dealsponsor
description: Deterministic, independently-verified land-use feasibility + tentative-mapping for highly-regulated CA. Turns a raw parcel into a legally-defensible conservation-cluster package: a comb frontage-lot engine bisection-solves each lot to an exact acreage, an INDEPENDENT verifier recomputes every area from geometry to block metric-gaming, and a firewall/posture gate guards the output. Concept exhibits only — a licensed PE/PLS produces the stamped, recordable map. Not legal, engineering, securities, or investment advice.
